title: Broadcast-coordinator convention + Research System decision + event-warning baseline cleanup
description: Follow-up to TASK-140/141: (1) add a durable broadcast-coordinator convention to AGENTS.md/helper-agent-guide so multi-agent hcom broadcasts declare owner/scope instead of relying on ad-hoc good behavior; (2) resolve whether Research System should be exercised now or formally deferred (it is documented/validator-backed but has zero real artifacts per TASK-130); (3) normalize validate_events.py's 33-warning baseline so new warnings don't hide inside it.
acceptance_criteria: Broadcast coordinator convention documented in AGENTS.md and helper-agent-guide.md
Research System has an explicit decision recorded (exercise now with a real artifact, or formally deferred with a documented reason) in shared/decisions.md
validate_events.py distinguishes/baselines known legacy warnings from new ones without silencing new warning types
